description: Debate surrounding the Australian government's release of the COVIDSafe contact tracing app in 2020. Concerns over data privacy and storage location created a significant divide between public health compliance and data sovereignty.

key_events.description: Launch of COVIDSafe app with government promises of privacy.
Tech experts highlight vulnerabilities in the data encryption.
Government releases source code to quell security concerns.
Public health benefits begin to overshadow privacy fears as lockdown fatigue peaks.

calibration_notes: Shows how trust in technical transparency measures can arrest a decline in public support.
